Here is an outline of the compensation plan, which is not exclusive to any minimum broker origination charge required by Groves Capital.
The max broker origination charge allowed by Citadel Servicing is three percent (3%).
1. For any eligible mortgage loan application submitted by Groves Capital for an owner occupied loan the broker may charge up to three (3%) Borrower-Paid compensation fee on a loan-by-loan basis.
2. For any eligible mortgage loan application submitted by Groves Capital for a Non-Owner occupied, business purpose loan with a pre-payment penalty,

on a loan-by-loan basis, broker may elect to receive both Borrower-Paid compensation and Lender-Paid compensation on the same transaction, provided that the aggregate of all compensation does not exceed three percent (3%).
